_doc: Machine-readable lane->epic index the ops-monitor (scripts/ops-monitor-check.sh) reads with jq. Join key = epic_id; ready-count per lane = `br ready --parent <epic_id> --limit 0 --json`. A lane is KNOWN/resumable when gate is null or expired; GATED only when a non-null unexpired gate object is present. epic_id:null REQUIRES a non-null gate (the lane has no ready-bead source, so it can never spuriously fire the stall wake). Admiral-owned; captain updates on staffing. Update in the SAME action as any lane add/retask/park. Seed = active + on-deck + parked lanes only (DONE lanes are not staffing candidates).

lanes.label: codename:remote-hardening
lanes.note: STAFFED 2026-06-30 (crew gurney, #1 priority). Local L0-L5 test pyramid + isolated test-daemon harness FIRST (no live-daemon restart), then live hk-nepva on gb-mbp (confirm worker_name=gb-mbp via events.jsonl). Blocker hk-t1t00 CLOSED.

lanes.label: codename:pilot
lanes.note: STAFFED 2026-06-30 (crew leto, re-tasked from codex). Pi+OpenRouter harness Phase-0 BUILD (mirrors codex). Operator UNGATED. Lead bead hk-4rmj1 (B3); blocker hk-1c16h (B2) CLOSED. Fresh queue leto-q (old leto-codex retired/paused).

lanes.label: codename:keeper-redesign
lanes.note: STAFFED 2026-06-30 (crew paul). hk-u5tgh UNGATED 2026-06-30: operator SETTLED the keeper architecture (HYBRID — keep per-crew deterministic keepers AND a probabilistic overseer on top that re-arms when a keeper fails; the hk-u5tgh fix routes overseer/watchdog restarts THROUGH the daemon crew-start path so the keeper window survives). Both hk-xxcv9 (crew-boot keeper auto-arm) and hk-u5tgh now dispatchable on paulk-q. epic hk-tswe0 used for attribution (no umbrella keeper epic).

lanes.label: codename:codex
lanes.note: PARKED 2026-06-30: crew leto re-tasked to the pilot lane per operator directive. Known/resumable lane (codex concurrency pilot); restaff if slots free + operator wants codex offload back online.

lanes.label: codename:wake-economy
lanes.note: PARKED 2026-06-30 (no crew; MVP done/live). Standing token-opt lane. Zero ready beads = parked-as-fact, NOT gated; resume the instant ready file-disjoint work appears.

lanes.label: codename:scavenger
lanes.note: PARKED 2026-06-30 (crew thufir cleared on wake). Standing serial orphan-backlog drainer (codex-first + DOT review). Known/resumable; restaff if operator wants the backlog drain back online + a free slot exists.
